case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. OSCAR FERNANDO MONTERO VALLADARES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VALLADARES, OSCAR FERNANDO MONTERO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OSCAR FERNANDO MONTERO VALLADARES IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLADARES, OSCAR FERNANDO MONTERO $2,321.83 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,421.83 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,321.83 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT VALLADARES, OSCAR FERNANDO MONTERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
